About Me

Who I Am

Developer · Problem Solver · Top 10 Bano Qabil HPT

Background

I'm a 21-year-old BS(IT) student at the University of Punjab with a strong academic record — A+ in both Matric and Pre-Engineering. I've turned that discipline into real-world engineering: a WordPress internship, a Gemini AI-powered construction marketplace as my Final Year Project, and a spot in Bano Qabil's High Performance Track — reserved for the top 10 students in the Mobile Development cohort.

Approach

I care deeply about clean architecture, smooth user experience, and code built to last. Whether it's an AI-powered construction marketplace, a fitness app with OpenRouter integration, or a focused programming chatbot — I bring the same standard: ship something that genuinely works well.

06 / 07
Bano Qabil HPT · Individual Project · 2026
Zikar & Tasbeeh Tracker
📍 2026 · Bano Qabil, Rawalpindi

A clean Flutter app for tracking daily Islamic Zikar and Tasbeeh sessions. Users create custom Zikar entries with a target count (e.g. 33, 100), then tap to count in a focused counter workspace — with a circular progress indicator and a "Goal Reached!" animation when complete.

Tasbeeh Dashboard — view all Zikar sessions with progress
Add new Zikar with custom name & target count
Tap-to-count workspace with circular progress indicator
"Goal Reached!" animation when target is hit
Reset counter & persistent local storage
Clean minimal dark UI — distraction-free counting
FlutterDartSQLiteHiveLocal Storage
01 / 07
Bano Qabil · Final Project · 2025–2026
BQ Spark
📍 2025–2026 · Bano Qabil, Rawalpindi

A Flutter Android app built exclusively for Bano Qabil's top 10 High Performance Track students. Students log in with a unique instructor-assigned Student ID and access a fully personalised learning hub — styled in Bano Qabil's official green and golden colours.

Unique Student ID login assigned by instructor
4-stage progress: Course → BQ Spark → Supervised → Industry Placement
View & complete tasks, earn points & live HPT leaderboard
Learning resources, tech news & push notifications via FCM
FlutterDartFirebaseFirestoreFCMFirebase Auth

Bano Qabil HPT · Week 1 · 2026
SpendWise
📍 2026 · Bano Qabil, Rawalpindi

Offline-first Flutter expense tracker. Built & evaluated in one week with live APK demo and GitHub repo. Monthly summaries with pie chart spending breakdown — no internet required.

Income & expense entries with category, date, note
Predefined & custom categories
Monthly summary: income, expenses, balance
Pie chart breakdown · Fully offline (Hive/SQLite)
FlutterDartHiveSQLitefl_chart
